## What it does

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED: overview -->
Independently reviews prompt-engineering artifacts against the HVE rubric and returns bounded findings plus a verdict. Dispatched by hve-builder.
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED: overview -->
